included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Hampi Ruins & Ancient Monuments
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hampi. Spend the day touring the magnificent ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire, including Virupaksha Temple and the iconic Stone Chariot.

itinerary.title: Journey from Hampi to Goa
itinerary.description: Embark on a scenic drive across the Western Ghats into Goa. Check in to your beach hotel and enjoy a relaxing evening by the sea.

itinerary.title: Old Goa Churches & Mandovi River Cruise
itinerary.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Portuguese-era churches of Old Goa. In the evening, enjoy a sunset boat cruise along the scenic Mandovi River.

itinerary.title: Travel to Mysore & Palace Illumination
itinerary.description: Travel south to the heritage city of Mysore. In the evening, tour the spectacular, illuminated Mysore Palace and the bustling Devraj Market.

itinerary.title: Thrills at Wonderla Amusement Park
itinerary.description: Enjoy a full day of non-stop action and high-energy excitement at Wonderla, testing your courage on the extreme land and water slides.

itinerary.title: Mysore Sightseeing & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit Chamundi Hills and the Nandi Bull temple. Shop for traditional Mysore silk and sandalwood souvenirs before transferring for your departure.

title: Hampi, Goa & Mysore: Ruins, Beaches & Palaces
description: A grand 6-day holiday blending the ancient stone temples of Hampi, the tropical beaches and river cruises of Goa, the royal palaces of Mysore, and a day of amusement park fun at Wonderla.
highlights: Tour the ancient Vijayanagara ruins and temples in Hampi
Enjoy a Mandovi River sunset cruise and beach sports in Goa
Explore the illuminated Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Enjoy high-thrill rides and adventure at Wonderla Amusement Park
